creator: wojtek@3miasto.net.pl
text:
this system crashes within 5 minutes after booting.

before this lots of messages like this

kernel: g_vfs_done():ada0s3d.eli[WRITE(offset=31219908608, length=65536)]error =11

appear, then it just hard-reboots

by moving back to older kernel (r251618), even with new userland - everything works properly.

How-To-Repeat: just use geli(8)
